message:
fix(freeze): fix insert2/3/4 opcodes and add expression-mode handlers

The insert2, insert3, insert4 opcodes were incorrectly implemented as
simple value moves, but QuickJS uses them as dup_x1/dup_x2 operations
that duplicate the value AND insert it below other operands.

This fixes nullish coalescing with assignment expressions like:
  _a.val ?? (_a.val = 'set')

Changes:
- insert2: [obj, val] -> [val, obj, val] (was just swapping)
- insert3: [obj, prop, val] -> [val, obj, prop, val]
- insert4: [this, obj, prop, val] -> [val, this, obj, prop, val]

Also adds expression-mode handlers for better vstack optimization:
- push_this: keeps this in expression mode
- is_undefined_or_null: keeps check result in expression mode
- object: creates empty object in expression mode

Fixes Zig 0.15 compatibility:
- Renamed shadowed TAG_MASK constant to TAG_MASK_32
- Removed invalid 'export' from 'pub noinline fn' syntax
